semantic.role: Root configuration for the ArchSpine project mirror system, defining core operational parameters, scanning policy, artifact generation, hooks, and initialization defaults.
responsibilities: LLM provider and MCP context mode
Artifact generation strategy and enabled views
Scanning policy: file source, ignore chains, protocol inclusions/exclusions
Initialization state for agent instructions, ignore files, and git attributes
invariants: schemaVersion must be a valid semver string.
project.name provides the canonical project identifier.
scanPolicy.protocolExclusions prevents scanning of the entire `.spine/` directory by default.
protocolInclusions explicitly re-include essential `.spine/` subpaths like rules and config.
initState flags track whether core files were created by ArchSpine vs. manually.

English.role: Root configuration for the ArchSpine project mirror system, defining core operational parameters, scanning policy, artifact generation, hooks, and initialization defaults.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Defines the version of the configuration schema; must follow semver for compatibility.
parameter_definitions.project.name: The canonical name of the project being mirrored; used for identity in all subsystems.
parameter_definitions.project.locales: List of supported locales for atlas documentation; currently English and Simplified Chinese.
parameter_definitions.llm: LLM provider configuration; empty in this snippet, but can be populated with model endpoints.
parameter_definitions.mcp.contextMode: Determines context aggregation mode for MCP server; 'off' means no context enrichment.
parameter_definitions.hooks.preCommit: Enables or disables pre-commit hook integration; false means hook is not active.
parameter_definitions.hooks.syncMode: Defines how sync operations are triggered; 'hook' means via git hooks.
parameter_definitions.artifacts.strategy: Artifact distribution model; 'distributable' means artifacts can be published separately.
parameter_definitions.artifacts.experimentalViewLayer: Enables experimental view layer for advanced rendering of architecture views.
parameter_definitions.artifacts.enabledViews: List of view types to generate: public-surface, risk-hotspots, architecture-diagram.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.fileSource: Determines which files the scanner considers; 'git-tracked' only scans files in git index.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.ignoreChain.inheritGitIgnore: Whether to inherit patterns from the repository's .gitignore.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.ignoreChain.projectIgnore: Path to a project-level ignore file (.spineignore).
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.ignoreChain.localIgnore: Path to a local override ignore file (.spineignore.local).
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolExclusions: Paths excluded from scanning by default; protects internal spine directories.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolInclusions: Paths re-included from exclusions; ensures critical spine config is scanned.
parameter_definitions.initState.artifactStrategy: Initial artifact strategy used during first initialization.
parameter_definitions.initState.agentInstructionsFile: Name of the agent instructions file (default AGENTS.md).
parameter_definitions.initState.agentInstructionsCreatedByArch: Flag indicating whether AGENTS.md was auto-generated.
parameter_definitions.initState.searchIgnoreManaged: Whether search ignore files are managed.
parameter_definitions.initState.searchIgnoreCreatedByArchSpine: Flag for auto-generation of search ignore.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration file controls the core scanning and artifact pipeline. Misconfiguring scanPolicy (e.g., removing protocolExclusions) may cause ArchSpine to index its own internal files, leading to recursive loops and data corruption. Setting `hooks.preCommit` to true without proper testing can block commits unexpectedly. The `artifacts.experimentalViewLayer` feature is marked experimental; enabling it may introduce rendering instability. The `initState` flags are critical for upgrade and migration workflows; incorrect values may cause the system to overwrite user-managed files or fail to update managed files. The `mcp.contextMode` value 'off' disables all context enrichment, which reduces LLM overhead but also reduces response quality for agent interactions. Overall, this file must be reviewed carefully during setup and upgrades.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 项目镜像系统的根配置文件，定义了核心运行参数、扫描策略、产物生成、钩子以及初始化默认值。

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 定义配置模式的版本号，必须遵循语义化版本以确保兼容性。
parameter_definitions.project.name: 被镜像项目的规范名称，用于所有子系统中的身份标识。
parameter_definitions.project.locales: 支持的地域列表，用于生成多语言文档；当前为英语和简体中文。
parameter_definitions.llm: 大语言模型提供商配置；当前为空，可添加模型端点。
parameter_definitions.mcp.contextMode: MCP 服务器的上下文聚合模式；'off' 表示不进行上下文增强。
parameter_definitions.hooks.preCommit: 是否启用预提交钩子；false 表示钩子未激活。
parameter_definitions.hooks.syncMode: 定义同步操作的触发方式；'hook' 表示通过 Git 钩子触发。
parameter_definitions.artifacts.strategy: 产物分发模型；'distributable' 表示产物可独立发布。
parameter_definitions.artifacts.experimentalViewLayer: 是否启用实验性视图层，用于高级架构视图渲染。
parameter_definitions.artifacts.enabledViews: 需要生成的视图类型列表：公开表面、风险热点、架构图。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.fileSource: 扫描器考虑的文件来源；'git-tracked' 仅扫描 Git 索引中的文件。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.ignoreChain.inheritGitIgnore: 是否继承仓库 .gitignore 中的模式。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.ignoreChain.localIgnore: 本地覆盖忽略文件路径 (.spineignore.local)。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolExclusions: 默认排除的扫描路径；用于保护内部骨架目录不被扫描。
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolInclusions: 从排除中重新包含的路径；确保关键骨架配置被扫描。
parameter_definitions.initState.artifactStrategy: 首次初始化时使用的产物策略。
parameter_definitions.initState.agentInstructionsFile: 代理指令文件名（默认为 AGENTS.md）。
parameter_definitions.initState.agentInstructionsCreatedByArch: 标记 AGENTS.md 是否由 ArchSpine 自动生成。
parameter_definitions.initState.spineIgnoreManaged: 是否由 ArchSpine 管理 .spineignore 文件。
parameter_definitions.initState.spineIgnoreCreatedByArchSpine: 标记 .spineignore 是否自动生成。
parameter_definitions.initState.searchIgnoreManaged: 是否管理搜索忽略文件。
parameter_definitions.initState.searchIgnoreCreatedByArchSpine: 标记搜索忽略文件是否自动生成。
parameter_definitions.initState.gitIgnoreCreatedByArchSpine: 标记 .gitignore 是否自动生成。
parameter_definitions.initState.gitAttributesCreatedByArchSpin: 标记 .gitattributes 是否自动生成。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置文件控制核心扫描和产物生成流程。如果错误配置 scanPolicy（例如移除 protocolExclusions），可能导致 ArchSpine 索引自己的内部文件，造成递归循环和数据损坏。将 `hooks.preCommit` 设置为 true 而未充分测试时，可能意外阻塞提交。`artifacts.experimentalViewLayer` 功能标记为实验性，启用后可能带来渲染不稳定。`initState` 标志对于升级和迁移工作流至关重要；错误的值可能导致系统覆盖用户管理的文件，或无法更新受管理的文件。`mcp.contextMode` 设为 'off' 会禁用所有上下文增强，降低 LLM 开销但也会降低代理交互的响应质量。总体而言，在设置和升级过程中必须仔细审查此文件。
